summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BlockQuest Miners Web3 educational game. All 5 levels functional, game mechanics working correctly, mobile-responsive design verified, and complete game flow from start to finish tested successfully.
passed_tests: Level 1 Basic Chain: Drag-drop blocks to correct R-B-G order with success animation and confetti
Level 1 XP system: +50 XP awarded correctly, badge 'Chain Starter 🔗' earned
Level 2 Consensus: All 3 miners can vote, consensus mechanism validates majority Block B selection
Level 3 Tamper Detection: Original vs current chain comparison, block color fixing mechanics
Level 4 Proof of Work: Tapping mechanics for mining simulation, timer and progress tracking
Level 5 Full Chain: 5-block sequence (Genesis-1-2-3-4) arrangement and completion
Quest Complete page: Final celebration, badge display, Return to HQ functionality
Level unlocking system: Sequential level access based on completion progress
LocalStorage persistence: Game progress saves and restores correctly across sessions
Educational popups: Interactive 'What is a Blockchain?' explanations for each level
Mobile responsiveness: Game displays and functions correctly on 390x844 mobile viewport
Sound toggle: Audio controls work properly in header across all pages
Progress tracking: XP accumulation (50 per level = 250 total), badge collection system
Navigation: Back buttons, level transitions, homepage return functionality
UI polish: Retro pixel art theme, neon glow effects, confetti animations
Reset functionality: Puzzle reset buttons work on each level
Error handling: Proper validation messages for incorrect solutions
